name_en: (With full packaging)!!️【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Mini Shoulder Bag
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️【New Arrival】GG Emblem Series Mini Shoulder Bag
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This mini flap shoulder bag is carefully paired with cotton lining and features light gold hook closures.
Model: 815211.
Size: 20(L) x 14(W) x 8cm(D)
Color: Brown Leather / Original Leather.
